resources.string: Zodl is scanning the blockchain to retrieve your transactions. Older wallets can take hours to sync. Follow these steps to prevent interruption:
Keep the Zodl app open on an active phone screen.
To prevent your phone screen from going dark, turn off power-saving mode and keep your phone plugged in.
Keep the app open until your Keystone wallet is synced.
Keep the app open until your wallet is resynced.
Keep the app open until your wallet is fully restored.
